allow: Bash(find '/c/Users/jp_vi/.claude/Projetos/Nova LP - Dr. Atyla Neto' -maxdepth 1 -type f -name *.json -o -name *.ts -o -name *.js)

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''Syringe:'', !!lucide.Syringe\); console.log\(''Vertebrae:'', !!lucide.Vertebrae\); console.log\(''Spine:'', !!lucide.Spine\); console.log\(''Crosshair:'', !!lucide.Crosshair\); console.log\(''Award:'', !!lucide.Award\); console.log\(''Cpu:'', !!lucide.Cpu\); console.log\(''Bone:'', !!lucide.Bone\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = [''Syringe'',''Vertebrae'',''Spine'',''Crosshair'',''Award'',''Cpu'',''Bone'',''Shield'',''Leaf'',''Activity'',''Star'']; names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n + '': '' + \(typeof l[n] !== ''undefined''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); [''Syringe'',''Vertebrae'',''Spine'',''Crosshair'',''Award'',''Cpu'',''Bone'',''Shield'',''Leaf'',''Activity'',''Star''].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof l[n] === ''object''\)\)")
